center.name: Gulf of California xeric scrub
center.summary: Gulf of California xeric scrub是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括California gnatcatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the main part of its range on the Baja California peninsula, the California gnatcatcher inhabits a variety of dry habitats including the Baja California desert and Gulf of California xeric scrub

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the main part of its range on the Baja California peninsula, the California gnatcatcher inhabits a variety of dry habitats including the Baja California desert and Gulf of California xeric scrub
